name: Honey Granola Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the water, yeast or fast-acting yeast, applesauce, and honey until smooth.
3. Add flour, dry milk, and salt; stir until combined. Stir in granola and walnuts if using.
4. Pour dough onto a lightly greased baking sheet and spread into an even layer.
5. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Remove from oven and let cool on wire rack before slicing.
